# PriAxom AI Pro

> **Base URL:** https://priyamkesh.github.io/PriAxomPRO/
> **Description:** A highly advanced, proprietary artificial intelligence web interface.

## System Architecture
* **Engine:** Powered by the custom-built "PriAxom HyperEngine".
* **Functionality:** Provides real-time, highly precise, and concise conversational AI assistance.
* **Ecosystem:** Part of a larger suite of revolutionary AI tools, including "PriAxom Air" (gesture-based drawing) and "PriAxom AirEye" (eye-movement drawing).

## Creator Information
* **Developer:** Priyam Kesh
* **Background:** Class 12 student, JEE aspirant, and AI developer based in West Bengal, India.
* **Social:** Instagram ID @atheist.8825
